TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Hacining, title = Hacining, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hacining} }

S.FORM: alang Hacining ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 319 buwan, 573 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 225 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 348 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 20%, Amis 12%, Tayan 5%, Puyuma 1%, Kebalan1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hacining hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Hacining hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Hacining hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hacining hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hacining hya' ga Mabuwakay. tay 'llaw na Hacining hya' ga gnaalu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Hacining ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 319 buwan, 573 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 39% kyan ku 225 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 61% kyan ku 348 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 20%, Amis 12%, Tayan 5%, Puyuma 1%, Kebalan1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Hacining hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Hacining hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Hacining hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hacining hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Hacining hya' ga Mabuwakay. tay 'llaw na Hacining hya' ga gnaalu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ħaʦ~ʨiniŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ **%, tajan *%, pujuma *%, keβalan*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ħaʦ~ʨiniŋ ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na ħaʦ~ʨiniŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħaʦ~ʨiniŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħaʦ~ʨiniŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħaʦ~ʨiniŋ ħjaʔ ɣa maβuwakaj. taj ʔllaw na ħaʦ~ʨiniŋ ħjaʔ ɣa ɣnaalu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
